label: Common Crawl
description: Creates and maintains web-scale snapshots of publicly accessible pages.

label: OpenAI
description: Developed CLIP as a model for measuring image-text similarity.

label: LAION
description: Builds and distributes large-scale open image-text datasets.

label: Human Raters
description: Supply preference judgments used to train aesthetic scoring models.

label: CLIP
description: Measures semantic similarity between image and text embeddings.

label: CLD3
description: Assigns language labels to caption text.

label: Filter + Threshold
description: Applies similarity and language thresholds to accept or eliminate candidate pairs.

label: Aesthetic Predictor
description: Estimates perceived aesthetic quality from human-rated images.

label: Web Pages
description: Source pages containing images and associated text.

label: LAION-5B
description: Dataset of 5.85 billion filtered image-text pairs.

label: Aesthetic Score
description: Predicted preference score used to form aesthetic subsets.
